simple_types.name: Fix_Point_16_16
simple_types.code:
type Fix_Point_16_16 is
  delta Fix_Point_16_16_Delta
  range -2.0 ** 15 .. 2.0 ** 15 - Fix_Point_16_16_Delta
  with Size => 32;

simple_types.name: VL53L0X_GPIO_Functionality
simple_types.code:
type VL53L0X_GPIO_Functionality is
  (No_Interrupt,
   Level_Low,
   Level_High,
   Out_Of_Window,
   New_Sample_Ready);

simple_types.name: VL53L0X_Ranging_Sensor

subprograms.name: Set_Device_Address
Set_GPIO_Config
Set_Measurement_Timing_Budget

documentation.description:
Sets the measurement timing budget.
The more time, the more precisions. By default, the budget is ~33ms

Set_VCSEL_Pulse_Period_Pre_Range
Start_Continuous

documentation.description:
Start cyclic reads.
If Period_Ms is 0, run as fast as possible.
